mapper.select: SELECT tr.relation_id AS relationId, et.user_id AS enterpriseTeacherId, et.real_name AS enterpriseTeacherName, et.employee_no AS enterpriseTeacherEmployeeNo, e.enterprise_id AS enterpriseId, e.enterprise_name AS enterpriseName, tr.direction_id AS directionId, md.direction_name AS directionName, tr.cohort AS cohort, tr.relation_type AS relationType, CASE tr.relation_type WHEN 'DIRECT' THEN '直接配对' WHEN 'ASSIST' THEN '辅助支持' ELSE tr.relation_type END AS relationTypeDesc, tr.is_enabled AS isEnabled, IFNULL(approved.cnt, 0) AS approvedTopicCount, IFNULL(sel_topic.cnt, 0) AS selectionTopicCount, IFNULL(confirmed.cnt, 0) AS confirmedStudentCount FROM teacher_relationship tr INNER JOIN user_info et ON tr.enterprise_teacher_id = et.user_id AND et.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN enterprise_info e ON tr.enterprise_id = e.enterprise_id LEFT JOIN major_direction_info md ON tr.direction_id = md.direction_id AND md.deleted = 0 /* 终审通过课题数 */ LEFT JOIN ( SELECT creator_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM topic_info WHERE deleted = 0 AND review_status = 6 GROUP BY creator_id ) approved ON approved.creator_id = tr.enterprise_teacher_id /* 有选报记录的课题数（不限状态） */ LEFT JOIN ( SELECT t.creator_id, COUNT(DISTINCT t.topic_id) AS cnt FROM topic_info t INNER JOIN topic_selection s ON s.topic_id = t.topic_id AND s.deleted = 0 WHERE t.deleted = 0 GROUP BY t.creator_id ) sel_topic ON sel_topic.creator_id = tr.enterprise_teacher_id /* 已中选学生数 */ LEFT JOIN ( SELECT t.creator_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM topic_info t INNER JOIN topic_selection s ON s.topic_id = t.topic_id AND s.deleted = 0 AND s.selection_status = 1 WHERE t.deleted = 0 GROUP BY t.creator_id ) confirmed ON confirmed.creator_id = tr.enterprise_teacher_id WHERE tr.univ_teacher_id = #{univTeacherId} AND tr.deleted = 0 ORDER BY tr.is_enabled DESC, tr.create_time DESC
